A C G I W 
All Classes All Packages

A

Attachable - Interface in io.foldright.wrain
This Attachable interface is used to be implemented by wrapper classes, provide the attachment storage ability.

C

check(W, Predicate<? super W>) - Static method in interface io.foldright.wrain.Wrapper
Reports whether any wrapper on the wrapper chain satisfy predicate.

G

getAttachment(W, String) - Static method in interface io.foldright.wrain.Wrapper
Retrieves the attachment of wrapper of given key on the wrapper chain by calling Attachable.wrainGet(String).

I

io.foldright.wrain - package io.foldright.wrain
Wrain(Inspectable Wrapper Chain), a nano library provides the interfaces to make wrapper instances as an inspectable wrapper chain.
isInstanceOf(W, Class<?>) - Static method in interface io.foldright.wrain.Wrapper
Reports whether any wrapper on the wrapper chain matches the given type.

W

wrainGet(String) - Method in interface io.foldright.wrain.Attachable
Get the attachment of the given key.
wrainSet(String, Object) - Method in interface io.foldright.wrain.Attachable
Sets an attachment.
wrainUnwrap() - Method in interface io.foldright.wrain.Wrapper
Returns the underlying instance that be wrapped.
Wrapper<T> - Interface in io.foldright.wrain
This Wrapper interface is used to be implemented by wrapper classes, make the wrapper instances as a wrapper chain(linked list).
